texto: A villain must be a thing of power, handled with delicacy and grace. He must be wicked enough to excite our aversion, strong enough to arouse our fear, human enough to awaken some transient gleam of sympathy. We must triumph in his downfall, yet not barbarously nor with contempt, and the close of his career must be in harmony with all its previous development.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Agnes Repplier sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. A afirmação “A villain must be a thing of power, handled with delicacy and grace. He must be wicked enough to …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a trabalho, power, villain, útil em momentos de villain.
